scripts.sync: cp /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/karabiner.edn ~/.config/ && goku && osascript -e 'display notification "Done syncing" with title "Karabiner"'
scripts.kinesis: test -d /Volumes/ADV360/layouts && cp kinesis-layout1.txt /Volumes/ADV360/layouts/layout1.txt && cp kinesis-layout1.txt /Volumes/ADV360/layouts/layout2.txt && cp kinesis-layout1.txt /Volumes/ADV360/layouts/layout3.txt && cp kinesis-layout1.txt /Volumes/ADV360/layouts/layout4.txt && echo 'Copied to all 4 layout slots' || echo 'Kinesis drive not mounted'
